{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193647CA2BA14ED021B4EE45B4"}"},"total":4853},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7381264551448920894","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看！！！！不是那种很俗的很尬的（什么龙王战神之类）小说，慢羊羊村长真的爱羊村里的每个孩子，喜羊羊与懒羊羊就是最好的朋友！！！！熊出没也没有毒点，符合原作（喜之郎强！！！）挂我感觉开的挺大的，但是不算打破平衡，属于能增强看文的爽度，但是又不会很失智的，规则的添加就是有原著的基础又加上了规则怪谈特有的特色，强烈推荐，最后希望作者大大速更。","text_exts":[{"e":50,"s":47,"text":"喜羊羊","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%96%9C%E7%BE%8A%E7%BE%8A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265808B4EE45B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227381264551448920894%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227365357768418544702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%96%9C%E7%BE%8A%E7%BE%8A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":54,"s":51,"text":"懒羊羊","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%87%92%E7%BE%8A%E7%BE%8A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265808B4EE45B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227381264551448920894%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227365357768418544702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%87%92%E7%BE%8A%E7%BE%8A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":68,"s":65,"text":"熊出没","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%86%8A%E5%87%BA%E6%B2%A1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265808B4EE45B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227381264551448920894%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227365357768418544702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%86%8A%E5%87%BA%E6%B2%A1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":148,"s":144,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265808B4EE45B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227381264551448920894%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227365357768418544702%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718588032,"group_id":"7365357768418544702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手一名，十多年小说迷头一回写书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+b7Q1rDtgIoNYWGOUd0hDg=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d08f64166059471682ff58da1ea3bcd8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791431&x-signature=28Jtu2elOp%2B0BUWYQXgYkJZr7Y4%3D","user_id":"111406495665","user_name":"怀青君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111406495665","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365357768418544702","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+御兽+搞笑+系统流+无女主】主角不圣母！
　　（本文不是传统御兽和国运规则怪谈，放心入）
　　一觉睡醒，林宇穿越到了以契约诡异为主的平行世界，还成了一名准高三“御诡师”？！
　　“我不过是熬夜看蓝狐，为什么要这么对我？”
　　“天理何在？伦理何在？外挂又何在？”
　　正当林宇义愤填膺，准备装病裹起小被子的时候，却发现学校的诡异副本叫【灰羊羊与喜太狼】？
　　进入副本的自己还变成了懒大王？！
　　“你要是说诡异我可能不懂，但要是说童年回忆，那我可就不困了！”
　　羊村规则一：
　　1.请遵守羊村规则，否则会发生可怕的事情。
　　2.请不要拒绝美羊羊的任何要求。
　　3.暖羊羊会梦游，夜晚请不要和她说话，不要被她发现。
　　4.沸羊羊热衷于健身，除非他看到你和美羊羊说话。
　　5.喜羊羊很喜欢帮助他人。
　　……
　　在林宇变身羊村恶霸，做出一路火花带闪电的离谱操作后，系统和他的小伙伴们都惊呆了。
　　“你不是不喜欢诡异吗？！”
　　“你管这叫童年回忆？？？”
（喜羊羊与灰太狼，大耳朵图图，熊出没，猪猪侠，海绵宝宝……）

"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,宠物,无女主,开局,搞笑轻松,无后宫,规则怪谈,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/be2f00a39c7440f109f9f2407e0c3465~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449808&x-signature=ITtymCd62PUpuVbiVn%2FTWnoR%2B1Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4367721660158936","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"63"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193647CA2BA14ED021B4EE45B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":66,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5099,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":88921},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405745154609480510","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱看推荐！直接一整个通宵怒看到早上8点，真的好看！！而且里面都是我喜欢的动画人物，大大的熟。翻了好久才找到这么一本喜欢的[哭]，然后又看完了[哭][哭]我也是又没书看了。开始漫长的等待作者更文的日子[翻白眼]而且作者是真的牛连更100多天了，勤劳的作者！作者～[送心]我还想看加菲猫～（重点标注）加菲猫！！！真的想看，非常非常想看求求了，[满地乱爬].jpg我觉得作者如果写的话一定能写得特别牛逼的！不想写也没事，不用管我胡言乱语。爱你作者[送心][送心][送心]让我在这无聊的日子里,充实的看了两天[爱心]喜欢看爱看！我要多看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724288904,"group_id":"7365357768418544702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看的超级无敌杂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxynfkrMZdqm5SSS1aaZfsY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/891037c7f47041eabb1e0c908e1a1f4d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796764&x-signature=Ifc%2F%2BJyKPAVsQgsLRRYQPfAvuuE%3D","user_id":"624112614521128","user_name":"wuu⦁֊⦁꧞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"624112614521128","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1678626790,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7365357768418544702","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+御兽+搞笑+系统流+无女主】主角不圣母！

　　“你不是不喜欢诡异吗？！”
　　“你管这叫童年回忆？？？”
（喜羊羊与灰太狼，大耳朵图图，熊出没，猪猪侠，海绵宝宝……）
